summary: Iteration 6 testing completed successfully. All 3 new features tested and working: 1) Notification bell in header with Enable Push button and unread count, 2) Branch-specific webhook endpoints for Google Ads & Meta lead capture (public endpoint), 3) Auto-notification when Branch Admin assigns tasks. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings for table elements (span inside tbody) - cosmetic only, same as previous iterations, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: NotificationCenter component shows bell icon in header with badge for unread count + due-soon follow-ups
Notification panel has 'Enable Push' button for browser push permission
GET /api/notifications/unread-count returns count of unread notifications
GET /api/followups/due-soon returns follow-ups due within 10 minutes for alarm functionality
POST /api/webhooks/leads/{webhook_key} is a PUBLIC endpoint (no auth required) for external platforms
Webhook captures leads from Google Ads/Meta and auto-creates lead with branch assignment
GET /api/admin/branches/{branch_id}/webhook-info returns webhook URL and usage instructions
Admin Panel Webhooks tab shows all branches with webhook URLs and sample JSON payload
POST /api/tasks creates task AND automatically creates notification for assigned user
seed_data_creation: Created test users (TEST_BranchAdmin, TEST_Counsellor) and webhook leads during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features verified working. NotificationCenter component polls every 30s for notifications and 60s for due-soon followups. Alarm sound plays for due-soon followups. Webhook endpoints allow external platforms (Google Ads, Meta) to POST leads without authentication - secured by unique webhook_key per branch. Task creation via POST /api/tasks automatically creates in-app notification with type='task' for the assigned user. MSG91 WhatsApp API is MOCKED (integration code exists but doesn't send actual messages).

mocked_apis.MSG91 WhatsApp API: WhatsApp notifications are configured but sending is MOCKED - returns success without actual delivery
mocked_apis.Browser Push Notifications: VAPID key is hardcoded for testing - proper VAPID keys should be generated for production

features_verified.Notification Bell - Header: WORKING - Bell icon visible with badge showing unread count
features_verified.Notification Panel - Enable Push: WORKING - Button visible to request browser notification permission
features_verified.GET /api/notifications/unread-count: WORKING - Returns {count: N} for unread notifications
features_verified.GET /api/followups/due-soon: WORKING - Returns follow-ups due within 10 minutes
features_verified.POST /api/webhooks/leads/{webhook_key}: WORKING - PUBLIC endpoint creates leads from external sources
features_verified.GET /api/admin/branches/{branch_id}/webh: WORKING - Returns webhook URL, key, and usage instructions
features_verified.POST /api/admin/branches/{branch_id}/reg: WORKING - Regenerates webhook key and invalidates old one
features_verified.Admin Panel - Webhooks Tab: WORKING - Shows all branches with webhook URLs, copy button, sample payload
features_verified.POST /api/tasks - Auto Notification: WORKING - Creates task and notification for assigned user
features_verified.GET /api/push-subscriptions/vapid-public: WORKING - Returns VAPID key for browser push

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/notifications - List all notifications for user

webhook_integration_notes.Google Ads: Use webhook URL as Lead Form Extension webhook endpoint
webhook_integration_notes.Meta/Facebook: Use webhook URL in Lead Ads → Instant Forms → CRM Integration
webhook_integration_notes.Payload format: POST JSON with name, phone, email, source, campaign, program_name (all optional except name & phone)
webhook_integration_notes.Security: Each branch has unique webhook_key; regenerate-key invalidates old URLs
